content.problemStatement:
You are given a set SSS of KKK numbers which is a set of first KKK powers of 222 (ie. 111,222,444,888,...)

Given NNN you have to construct an Array AAA[000, ..., N−1N-1N−1]  of length NNN such that A[i]A[i]A[i] must belong to SSS for all iii, 000 <= iii < NNN.

Find the maximum value of A[0]A[0]A[0] XOR A[1]A[1]A[1] XOR ... XOR A[N−1]A[N-1]A[N−1] that you can achieve. Here XOR is bitwise xor operator. Also, tell the number of arrays AAA that gives this maximum XOR.

Print both the numbers mod 109+710^9+7109+7.


Input Format

First line of Input contains the no of test cases T.
Each of the next T lines contains two integers: N and K.


Output Format

For every test case, print two space-separated integers: maximum possible XOR and the no of possible ways respectively, modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
constraints: Sum of  KKK over all testcases ≤1000000\leq 1000000≤1000000

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Here S=1,2,4S = {1,2,4}S=1,2,4
Then max xor is 111 xor 222 xor 4=74 = 74=7
Number of A=A = A= all permutation of [1,2,4]=6[1,2,4] = 6[1,2,4]=6
Therefore the output would be 7 6.
